title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入文莱：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入汶萊：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Brunei Department of Electrical Services (DES) grid-connection requirements, NSC national standards, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards applicable in Brunei project specifications, Fire and Rescue Department Brunei fire-safety requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and Brunei's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines. Notes tropical humidity derating considerations applicable to BESS installations in Brunei's climate.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与文莱电力服务局（DES）并网要求、NSC国家标准、文莱项目规格中适用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、文莱消防救援局消防安全要求、UN 38.3运输要求及文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。并注明适用于文莱气候条件下BESS装置的热带湿度降额考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與汶萊電力服務局（DES）併網要求、NSC國家標準、汶萊項目規格中適用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、汶萊消防救援局消防安全要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。並注明適用於汶萊氣候條件下BESS裝置的熱帶濕度降額考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DES grid-connection approval, NSC conformity scope determination, Fire and Rescue Department Brunei fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Brunei DES technical connection requirements, NSC applicable standards, Fire and Rescue Department Brunei fire-safety requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements directly with the relevant authorities and qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Published BESS-specific technical codes in Brunei may be limited — direct DES engagement is essential.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DES并网批准、NSC合格评定范围裁定、文莱消防救援局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应直接向相关主管机关及合格专业人士核验现行文莱DES技术并网要求、NSC适用标准、文莱消防救援局消防安全要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。文莱针对BESS的已发布专项技术规范可能有限——直接与DES接触至关重要。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DES併網批准、NSC合格評定範圍裁定、汶萊消防救援局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應直接向相關主管機關及合格專業人士核驗現行汶萊DES技術併網要求、NSC適用標準、汶萊消防救援局消防安全要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。汶萊針對BESS的已發布專項技術規範可能有限——直接與DES接觸至關重要。

answer_first.en: Brunei does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. The storage sector in Brunei is nascent, and published BESS-specific technical codes are limited. Grid-connected BESS installations require approval from the Department of Electrical Services (DES), which is the main electricity authority and grid connection regulator. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Brunei are: (1) DES grid-connection technical approval — no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification exists; direct DES engagement is mandatory before equipment procurement; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance, noting that Chinese GB standards are not accepted as substitutes; (3) tropical climate derating — Brunei's high-temperature, high-humidity environment requires verified thermal management performance beyond Chinese standard conditions; (4) Fire and Rescue Department Brunei fire-safety installation approval, with applicable code reference to be confirmed directly with the authority; (5) UN 38.3 transport documentation for import via Muara Port. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 or DES technical approval.
answer_first.zh: 文莱尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。文莱储能行业尚处起步阶段，已发布的BESS专项技术规范有限。并网BESS装置须取得电力服务局（DES）批准，DES为主要电力主管机关及并网连接监管机构。中国BESS出口文莱的实际差距包括：（1）DES并网技术审批——目前无公开确认的BESS专项技术规格，设备采购前须直接与DES接触；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准，中国GB标准不被接受为替代依据；（3）热带气候降额——文莱高温高湿环境要求超越中国标准条件的经验证热管理性能；（4）文莱消防救援局消防安全安装审批，适用规范参考须直接向主管机关确认；（5）经穆阿拉港进口的UN 38.3运输文件。中国GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但不被接受为IEC 62619或DES技术审批的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 汶萊尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。汶萊儲能行業尚處起步階段，已發布的BESS專項技術規範有限。併網BESS裝置須取得電力服務局（DES）批准，DES為主要電力主管機關及併網連接監管機構。中國BESS出口汶萊的實際差距包括：（1）DES併網技術審批——目前無公開確認的BESS專項技術規格，設備採購前須直接與DES接觸；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準，中國GB標準不被接受為替代依據；（3）熱帶氣候降額——汶萊高溫高濕環境要求超越中國標準條件的經驗證熱管理性能；（4）汶萊消防救援局消防安全安裝審批，適用規範參考須直接向主管機關確認；（5）經穆阿拉港進口的UN 38.3運輸文件。中國GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但不被接受為IEC 62619或DES技術審批的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
